title: Alex Hamed
text:

Name: Alex Hamed
Snapshot: 2026-07-21

confidence.rationale: Proposed from an explicit normalized Knowledge Object field.

education_entries: Ph D in International Studies, Int'l Political Economy, Old Dominion University
MA in Economics, Old Dominion University
BA in Agronomy, University of Alexandria, Egypt
research_interests: Globalization, economic development, economic statecraft, and the connection between foreign policy and nations' economic interests.
teaching_interests: Courses ECON 200 - The Economic Way of Thinking ECON 201 - Principles of Macroeconomics ECON 202 - Principles of Microeconomics ECON 300 - Quantitative Methods in ECONOMICS 303 - Intrm Microeconomic, and Econ 395 The Economics of Migration
publications: Journal Article, Academic Journal Gender Wage Inequality and Institutional Labor Market Structures in Public Higher Education . Economics of Education Review.
Journal Article, Academic Journal Leadership and Poverty Reduction: Addressing Wicked Problems through Adaptive Education . Community Development Journal.
Other (2025). Digital Remittances and Home Countries Institutions . MDPI AG.
Other (2025). The Rise and Fall of the Hedging Premium: Evidence from Globalizing Firms . MDPI AG.
Book, Chapter in Scholarly Book-New (2025). Is the Rising Public Debt a Threat to the US Economic Growth? An Empirical Investigation Using ARDL Approach . Springer Nature Switzerland. Pages, 373-391.

Journal Article, Professional Journal (2025). L’ODD « travail décent » versus l’emploi informel en Égypte (2008-2019) . Mondes en Développement. Volume, DOI : 10.3917/med.211.0073. Issue, De Boeck Superieur | Telecharge le 29/12/2025 sur.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2025). The “decent work” SDG vs. informal employment in Egypt (2008-2019) . Mondes en Dévelopement’ (Developing Worlds)..

Journal Article, Academic Journal Qatargate and Qatar’s World Cup Legacy: Corruption, Labor Abuse, and Geopolitical Fallout' (Submitted to International Journal of Sport Policy and Politics . International Journal of Sport Policy and Politics.

Journal Article, Academic Journal Remittances, Exports, and ODA: Their Impact on Economic Growth in Egypt of Economic Studies) . Maghreb-Mashreq International.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2024). Envois de fonds, exportations et APD : leur impact sur la croissance économique en Égypte . Maghreb - Machrek. Volume, n° 258. Issue, 2. Pages, 31-51.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2023). Public debt, current account, and economic growth in Germany: Evidence from a nonlinear ARDL model . The Journal of Economic Asymmetries. Volume, 28. Pages, e00335.
